creator: jarrod@netleader.com.au
text:
On 28/10/2006, at 10:20 AM, Artem Naluzhny wrote:
> 2006/10/28, Jarrod Sayers <jarrod@netleader.com.au>:
>> Would you be able to send me a copy of command line you are  
>> running that
>> generates this error? I am about to submit a PR to upgrade nagios- 
>> plugins
>> to 1.4.4 and would like to base any patches to check_disk from that.
>
> /usr/local/libexec/nagios/check_disk -w 20% -c 10% -p /

I can't reproduce the fault but that doesn't mean its not there.  I  
submitted a PR to upgrade Nagios Plugins to 1.4.4 but it will be a  
while before its committed as the ports tree is frozen for the  
release of FreeBSD 6.2.  Before we investigate further, I would like  
to see what the state of this error is under 1.4.4 as there appears  
to be quite a few fixes to check_disk there.  If you feel game, the  
diff for the upgrade is downloadable from a link in the following URL.

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=104872

Jarrod.
